signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Resolved, Driving XRP Surge Above $1
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Resolved, Driving XRP Surge Above $1.50 in April 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**[1][3][4]

The SEC has dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, confirmed as a key catalyst for XRP's 10% rally in April 2026, breaking $1.50 resistance for the first time this year on April 17 before consolidating around $1.42-$1.48.[1][3][4] This resolution removes a major regul

signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Activity | NO whale bets or confirmed announcements reported | LOW c
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweet Count Markets Lead Polymarket Activity | NO whale bets or confirmed announcements reported | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets right now focus on **Elon Musk tweet predictions**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (with "200-219" at 29% odds) and the overall "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (crowd pricing 18% on 1080-1119 range).[1][2]
